items.title: Efficient open coding model weights
items.oneliner: Open coding model with downloadable weights and 30% lower token use for long-horizon software tasks.

items.title: Local filler-word removal CLI
items.oneliner: Local CLI strips ums, uhs, and erms from recordings using Whisper plus pause detection.

items.title: Automatic skeleton screens from DOM
items.oneliner: UI tool auto-generates pixel-matched skeleton loaders from your real DOM with zero manual configuration.

items.title: Coding model benchmark on real tasks
items.oneliner: Benchmark of 200 real coding tasks shows 59.8% solve rate and only 19.0% security success.

items.title: Vintage language model build log
items.oneliner: Hands-on walkthrough shows how to train a 340M historical Llama model from 1800s text.

items.title: MiMo Code open-source release
items.oneliner: Open-source coding project with public code and docs for building across languages and platforms.

items.title: Homebrew 6 for safer installs
items.oneliner: Package manager update adds tap trust, Linux sandboxing, and faster JSON-backed dependency operations.

items.title: AUR compromise incident details
items.oneliner: Security report names compromised AUR packages and gives immediate steps to audit and protect systems.

items.title: AMD updater RCE writeup
items.oneliner: Detailed vulnerability writeup shows how HTTP-based updater downloads enabled remote code execution attacks.

items.title: Interactive shortcut training keyboard
items.oneliner: Interactive 3D keyboard helps developers memorize app shortcuts faster across tools, devices, and operating systems.
